theme: slime mold wiring a city through walls
title: Protoplasm Wiring Diagram — Slime Mold Steiner Maze
strategies: do nothing: neutral mu=1.0, no thickness seed (baseline, ratio ~0.1)
reinforce every pairwise shortest path at mu=1.0 (textbook recipe; overlapping redundant tubes)
half-strength pairwise seed + geometric-median hub nudge + mu>1 flow-merging exponent (discovers a true Steiner junction)
multi-hub / iterative re-seeding search over mu and candidate junction sets (open)
